targets.boundary: for our operations and data centers
targets.notes: By FY25, and annually thereafter, we will achieve and maintain 100% renewable electricity; we commit to procure renewable energy from sources that create additionality when available and commercially reasonable.
targets.title: Achieve and maintain 100% renewable electricity for our operations and data centers

targets.notes: By FY26, engage manufacturing suppliers comprising at least 67% of NVIDIA’s scope 3 category 1 GHG emissions (Purchased Goods and Services), with the goal of effecting supplier adoption of science-based targets aligned with limiting temperature rise to 1.5 degrees Celsius.
targets.title: Engage manufacturing suppliers comprising at least 67% of scope 3 category 1 GHG emissions to support adoption of science-based targets
